changeSet.author: shaparenko
shaparenko

and.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_trigger WHERE tgname = 'trg_ticket_count'

changeSet.sql: CREATE TRIGGER trg_ticket_count AFTER INSERT OR DELETE ON ticket FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION fn_update_tickets_sold();

rollback.sql: DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trg_ticket_count ON ticket;
